expected_pattern.context: Elevated blood pressure follows reported medication interruption.
expected_pattern.risk_language: May be associated; do not assert diagnosis or causality.
expected_pattern.action: Clinician reviews adherence, side effect, and treatment plan.

expected_pattern.context: Anamnesis carries more weight because the EHR is incomplete.
expected_pattern.uncertainty: Medication name, dose, labs, and external history are missing.
expected_pattern.action: Verify medication and obtain outside records.

expected_pattern.behavior: Routine synthesis is bypassed by the orchestrator.
expected_pattern.action: Immediate human escalation and measurement verification.
expected_pattern.prohibited: Do not delay escalation while gathering context.
